overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic coastal city. The player waits at a covered intersection, crosses through traffic, passes through a commercial passage with neon signage, and emerges onto a sunny waterfront promenade lined with palm trees overlooking a bay with towering skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban intersection with zebra crossing

events.description: futuristic silver sedan drives past from left to right across the crosswalk
red sports car speeds through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk observing traffic flow and waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with industrial pipes and beams spanning the street
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red WAIT text
brutalist concrete structures with small windows and commercial signage
sleek silver and black cars with futuristic design passing through the intersection

segments.scene_description: Standing at a covered urban intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass, observing futuristic traffic moving through the yellow-striped crosswalk. The environment is a mix of shadow and bright light from the opening ahead, with brutalist architecture lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk transitioning to covered commercial passage

events.description: begins walking forward across the zebra crossing toward the opposite sidewalk
enters covered walkway with green neon signage and concrete walls

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk and entering a covered passage, navigating through oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt and shorts walking across the crosswalk toward the camera
pedestrian in business suit walking briskly across the street

entered.detail: illuminated green sign with 'TEAM' text marking a commercial entrance
concrete ceiling with recessed lighting creating a tunnel-like passage
smooth gray concrete walls lining the pedestrian passage

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street through the zebra crossing while navigating past pedestrians, then turning right into a covered commercial passage with green neon signage. The environment transitions from open intersection to enclosed walkway with concrete walls and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking the bay

events.description: exits covered passage into bright direct sunlight causing lens flare and strong shadows
emerges from urban corridor onto open waterfront plaza with palm trees and ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking out of the covered passage onto the sunny waterfront promenade, adjusting to the bright light

entered.detail: large light-colored stone tiles covering the open pedestrian plaza
tall palm trees lining the promenade casting long shadows in the bright sun
futuristic digital advertising stands with colorful displays
distant futuristic skyscrapers and towers across the bay
modern safety railing with metal posts and glass panels along the water edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark covered passage into brilliant sunlight on an open waterfront promenade. The scene reveals palm trees, a tiled plaza, and stunning views of the bay with futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial to bright natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway with city skyline views and lower terrace levels

events.description: flying vehicle hovers over the water near the promenade, moving from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront walkway, observing the city skyline and passing other pedestrians on the promenade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with orange hair and white boots walking along the promenade in the same direction
flying car hovering over the water near the lower terrace

entered.detail: tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades dominating the skyline
green and yellow benches on the lower level terrace near the water
futuristic hovering car flying over the waterfront area

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunny waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the path and futuristic glass towers rising in the distance. The camera passes other pedestrians and observes a flying vehicle hovering over the water, with the city skyline providing a dramatic backdrop across the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed, brutalist urban intersection into a brilliant, sun-drenched waterfront promenade. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, observing futuristic traffic through a yellow-striped crosswalk where deep shadows contrast with the bright light of the open street. As the camera crosses the road and navigates past pedestrians, the scene shifts into an enclosed commercial passage characterized by concrete walls and glowing green neon signage. The environment then opens dramatically as the camera emerges from the dark walkway into blinding natural sunlight, revealing a tiled plaza lined with palm trees. Finally, the view expands across a wide bay toward a skyline of towering glass skyscrapers, passing other pedestrians while a flying vehicle hovers over the shimmering water.
